name: Bacon and Onion Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry bacon until crisp in a skillet. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
2. Saute onion in 1 tablespoon of bacon drippings until tender (do not brown). Set aside to cool.
3. Sift together flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a large mixing bowl.
4. Combine eggs, milk, and sour cream in a small bowl; blend well. Add all at once to dry ingredients, stirring just enough to moisten. Stir in bacon and sauteed onion. Spoon batter into greased 2 1/2-inch muffin pan cups, fill 2/3 full. Sprinkle with sesame seeds.
5. Bake in a 375 degree F oven for 18 to 20 minutes or until golden brown. Serve hot with homemade jelly or jam.
